meta.notes: Stale claims from run1/scorecard.md (n=3 wins) and mid-document ELEVATE-OR-KILL.md narrative are flagged superseded, not deleted. scientific-method M5 fresh primary +5.3pp p=0.061 (n=150, full sample) + M5 replication +8.0pp p=0.001 — primary delta >=5pp but p=0.061 fails the paired-test gate, so ELEVATE is NOT retained: downgraded to DIRECTIONAL-NOT-REPLICATED (full-n=150 does not pass >=5pp+p<0.05). Fix (VAL-POWERED-014): old run1 primary (+9.3pp) predated the 2026-06-01 SKILL.md rewrite and was replaced with a fresh post-edit primary run. M5 full-sample fix: run-swe.js hardened with retry logic + per-item persistence; 4 debugging-family skills brought to full n=224 (EVAL_RUN=m5-primary-decisive); scientific-method brought to full n=150 on the original SWE-bench set (EVAL_RUN=m5-primary-sci).

objective_evidence.dataset: Systems/product/strategy pairwise decisive split (117 items: 42 target bottleneck/margin-of-safety, 29 near-miss, 46 distractor)
objective_evidence.note: M5 powered run on systems-product-strategy-pairwise decisive split (aggregate baseline 57.4% — in-band). In-band quarantine candidate given a fair calibrated chance. +0.9pp over placebo not significant. Target-only: 88% vs 88% (Δ0pp, p=0.479). Distractor FPR: 36% with skill vs 37% placebo (trivially better). No lift detected.

objective_evidence.note: M5 FRESH post-edit PRIMARY on the ORIGINAL frozen 150-item SWE-bench set, full-n=150 (EVAL_RUN=m5-primary-sci, CONC=4, isolation ON). Genuinely post-edit: result mtime > SKILL.md mtime. 90.7% vs 85.3% placebo, +5.3pp, p=0.061. Delta >=5pp but p>0.05 — primary gate not passed. Replication (+8.0pp p=0.001, same direction) is significant but does not rescue a primary that fails the paired test. Downgraded from ELEVATE to DIRECTIONAL-NOT-REPLICATED per full-sample scrutiny (fix-m5-full-sample-completion).

M5 FRESH replication on the ORIGINAL frozen 150-item SWE-bench set. Successfully replicates the M5 fresh primary (+5.3pp) in the same positive direction: 90% vs 82% placebo, +8.0pp, p=0.001, significant. This is a strong replication SIGNAL confirming the directional effect is real. However, the overall skill verdict remains DIRECTIONAL-NOT-REPLICATED because the full-n=150 PRIMARY (+5.3pp, p=0.061) failed the p<0.05 decision gate — per architecture rules, BOTH primary AND replication must pass for ELEVATE.

M5 powered run. +1.3pp over placebo not significant. Confirms previous replication failure. PROVENANCE NOTE: systems was NOT reworked in this mission (no rework spec; SKILL.md edit predates the mission, split frozen 2026-06-06 before the 2026-06-07 result), so its anti-p-hacking guarantee is split-frozen-before-result (VAL-DATASET-009 refined two-tier rule), and its NO-LIFT verdict is immune to win-manufacturing.
